svg.text: Leave your scraps out once a week. Alfred collects,
delivers to a composting facility, and the nutrients
go back to local Cape Town farms.
Choose your plan at gooi.me — takes 3 minutes.
Same day each week — Alfred does the rest.
Try it out — no commitment, no kit required.
Starter kit not required · kit can be purchased separately
+ R200 starter kit (once-off, on first invoice)
+ R300 starter kit (once-off, on first invoice)
